name: Corn Muffins (Samuel)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Corn flour or cornmeal (yellow or blue)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flours in a large bowl.
2. Crumble the soft tofu into a blender.
3. Add the boiled water and salt to the tofu in the blender, blending until not quite smooth (a few pulses).
4. Do not use a small blender without a lid, as this can cause burns.
5. Pour the blended mixture into the flour mixture and mix well.
6. Spoon the batter into muffin tins or cast iron trays.
7. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Bake for about half an hour until golden brown.
9. A "wonderful crust" is achieved by heating the oven first and placing the prepared muffin tins inside to heat up before baking.
Note: Oiling the tins is necessary as I do not use Teflon products around my birds. This recipe is for savory corn and potato chowder, not sweet bread.
